testcase.name: lookupOrderIsCaseInsensitive
runDiagnosticReturnsDataForKnownUser
initiateRefundFailsForUnknownOrder
initiateRefundFailsForIneligibleOrder
searchKnowledgeBaseReturnsLowConfidenceForUnknownQuery
constructorLoadsDataFromExcel

testcase.name: unknownToolReturnsErrorJson
runDiagnosticReturnsFlagsForProblematicUser
missingRequiredFieldFallsBackGracefully
malformedInputJsonReturnsErrorGracefully
testcase.system-out: 21:00:52.883 [main] INFO c.e.s.mcp.MCPToolExecutor — Mock data loaded — orders=5 knowledgeBase=6 diagnostics=5 21:00:52.883 [main] DEBUG c.e.s.mcp.MCPToolExecutor — MCP dispatch → tool='lookup_order' input=not-valid-json{{{ 21:00:52.884 [main] ERROR c.e.s.mcp.MCPToolExecutor — MCP tool execution failed for 'lookup_order': Unrecognized token 'not': was expecting (JSON String, Number, Array, Object or token 'null', 'true' or 'false') at [Source: REDACTED (`StreamReadFeature.INCLUDE_SOURCE_IN_LOCATION` disabled); line: 1, column: 4]

testcase.name: runDiagnosticReturnsErrorForUnknownUser
lookupOrderReturnsErrorForUnknownOrder
searchKnowledgeBaseFindsReturnPolicy
initiateRefundSucceedsForEligibleOrder
createTicketGeneratesUniqueIds
createTicketAlwaysSucceeds
searchKnowledgeBaseIncludesQueryInResponse
lookupOrderReturnsDataForKnownOrder
